landing.hero.lead1: If your monthly report divides sales by all 30 days — it is wrong. We exclude the days when an item was out of stock and show
landing.hero.lead3: you can actually use to plan purchasing, analyze demand and control stock.
landing.int.sub: Read-only access via the Shopify API or Google Sheets. Every source = a separate warehouse.
landing.dash.sub: See at a glance what is running out, what is turning into dead stock, and where money leaks because of miscalculated sales velocity.
landing.feat.h2: Six things that save you money
landing.feat.sub: Every number is backed by methodology and a data-confidence score.
landing.feat.main.title: TVelo — true sales velocity
landing.feat.main.text: Calculates sales velocity excluding the days an item was out of stock. The real picture: which items sell fast and which turn into dead stock. The difference vs the naive formula can reach 50%.
landing.feat.cov.x: How long your stock will last. A signal in advance — not after the item is already gone.
landing.feat.lost.x: How much revenue you lose while an item is out of stock.
landing.feat.plan.x: Calculations based on true sales velocity and supplier lead time.
landing.feat.frozen.x: How much money is frozen in slow-moving SKUs.
landing.feat.conf.x: We score how trustworthy the data behind each decision is.
landing.cmp.h2: Excel vs Other tools vs Veloseller
landing.cmp.sub: Everyone shows sales. Veloseller shows what to do next.
landing.cta.sub: Connect your store — Shopify or Google Sheet. First numbers in 30 minutes, accurate analytics in 7 days.
landing.ft.desc: Inventory management for ecommerce sellers. TVelo, days of cover, data confidence — numbers you can trust.
landing.demo.note2: the item was not in stock. TVelo only counts
